summary: Front-end developer focused on building clean, responsive user interfaces and integrating them with backend services, while improving usability and maintainability.

duties.title: Frontend Development
duties.description: Developing and maintaining frontend applications with a focus on performance, readability, and user experience.

duties.title: API Integration
duties.description: Integrating frontend components with backend APIs and handling client-side data flow.

duties.title: UI/UX Collaboration
duties.description: Working closely with designers and team members to translate UI designs into functional interfaces.

achievements.title: Responsive UI Implementation
achievements.description: Implemented responsive layouts to ensure consistent user experience across different screen sizes.
achievements.impact: Improved accessibility and usability on desktop and mobile devices.

achievements.title: Frontend Codebase Improvement
achievements.description: Refactored existing frontend components to improve readability and maintainability.
achievements.impact: Reduced technical debt and made future feature development easier.

systems.name: Data Management Platform
systems.description: Internal and client-facing web platforms used for data visualization and management.
